ham.subject: Out of Office: Rohan Sharma
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Main 10 May 2024 tak office se bahar hoon. Email check nahi kar paunga. Agar koi urgent kaam ho toh please direct contact karein Mr. Asha Devi, Finance Manager.

Thanks & see you soon.

Regards,
Rohan

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Crypto Wallet Suspended – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have detected suspicious activity on your crypto wallet. As per regulatory compliance, your wallet has been temporarily suspended. To restore access, please verify your identity by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Failure to act within 24 hours may result in permanent lock and forfeiture of funds. Please do not ignore this message.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Security Team
Global Crypto Exchange
